title: Naayaadi
overview: Ancient India 1000's of years ago is filled with mystery and it is believed the witchcraft voodoo and black magic originated from ancient India.  There were several tribes involved in worshiping dark gods and performing human sacrifices.  At present an old couple buys a 200 year old bungalow to convert into a resort but to their horror they finds out the estate has a  supernatural entity  They seek help from a group of young youtubers to find more about the supernatural presence.Will the young youtubers be able to find out the centuries old secret and reveal the truth. What is the connection between them , the estate and Naayaadi ?
